reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed this movie. This is the exact content I want more of, and this is a solid start. It’s a particular type of humor that’s probably not for everyone but luckily, I am someone it is for. Such a bizarre and funny story. Worth every penny and I hope the developers are able to bring more movies in the future.

Ajax All Powerful offers a witty and inventive 17-minute VR comedy. The genie (Henry Winkler) is a magical creature who can grant three wishes. He must deal with a young woman, the new owner of the magic lamp, who is assisted by a lawyer (Chris Parnell) in drafting a contract that will be to her advantage… This is the starting point for a hilarious comedy where pure humor is combined with fluid storytelling and effective visual effects (rapid changes in perspective and scale). Don't miss the end credits, which are just as hilarious! 
A moment of pure, immersive madness, somewhere between Monty Python and Tex Avery. We want more!
Gameplay/Options: 
The experience works like an interactive 360° film. Select one of five chapters. 
Audio is available in two languages, Chinese or English, but unfortunately, there are no subtitles.
I was expecting something boring. Turn out to be quite funny and well done. Thanks for making it.
I loved Gargoyle Doyle and found this from the same creators. Honestly I like this one even better, it’s short and sweet.
This is awesome, a comedy movie in VR. It’s clever and I enjoyed it.
Voices were dope, really enjoyed this!
